Appearances:
Plaintiff Lily Sao Hom is present. Represented by
Attorney Stanley Shen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kui J Zhao and Alex Yin are present.
Attorney Daniel Wayne representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem O. Prochovnick litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of AUG-12-2013 is vacated. (D501/JPT)
